case_title: WILLIAM W. MINAHEN VS. RAY HOFFMAN

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER MINAHEN, WILLIAM W. AS TO RESPONDENT HOFFMAN, RAY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-24-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NTC OF MTN AND MTN TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER MINAHEN, WILLIAM W. HEARING SET FOR JUL-24-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
RESPONSE TO PETITION TO CONFIRM AWARD AND FOR ADDITONAL RELIEF FILED BY RESPONDENT HOFFMAN, III, RAY

LAW AND MOTION, 302, THE PARTIES REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT THEY HAVE REACHED AN AGREEMENT. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER WILLIAM MINAHEN'S MOTION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS OFF CALENDAR. THE PARTIES WILL SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER AND JUDGMENT BY EMAIL TO THE COURT. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jul-25-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lyman D. Bedford, Esq. of the Clausen Law Group, Tel. 510.234.5155, appearing for Petitioner and moving party;
Peter Flaxman, Esq. of the Law Offices of Peter Flaxman, Tel. 415.381.6650, appearing for Respondent and opposing party.

The parties represented to the court that they have reached an agreement. The court vacated its tentative ruling. PETITIONER WILLIAM MINAHEN'S Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is off calendar. The parties will submit a proposed order and judgment by email to the court. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
